learning_outcomes.statement: Apply strategies to independently plan and manage personal learning activities.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focuses on practical application of planning skills.

learning_outcomes.statement: Evaluate personal learning progress and adjust learning strategies accordingly.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasizes reflective practice and adaptive learning.

learning_outcomes.statement: Identify appropriate resources and tools to support autonomous learning.
learning_outcomes.notes: Targets critical selection of learning aids.

alignment_notes: Outcomes align with core concepts of self-directed learning and focus on skills essential for independent undergraduate learners.
